name: Currents
description: Interact with the Currents API for test orchestration and analytics

endpoints.label: Create Action

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Name
fields.description: The name of the action (1-255 characters)

fields.label: Matcher Type
fields.description: How to match tests for this action

fields.label: Matcher Value
fields.description: The value to match against (test title, spec file path, or signature)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: description, expiresAfter)

endpoints.description: Create a new action for a project

endpoints.label: Delete Action

fields.label: Action ID
fields.description: The ID of the action

endpoints.description: Archive an action (soft delete)

endpoints.label: Disable Action

fields.label: Action ID
fields.description: The ID of the action

endpoints.description: Deactivate an active action

endpoints.label: Enable Action

fields.label: Action ID
fields.description: The ID of the action

endpoints.description: Reactivate a disabled action

endpoints.label: Get Action

fields.label: Action ID
fields.description: The ID of the action

endpoints.description: Get a single action by ID

endpoints.label: Get Many Action

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: search, status)

endpoints.description: Get many actions for a project

endpoints.label: Update Action

fields.label: Action ID
fields.description: The ID of the action

fields.label: Update Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: name, description, expiresAfter)

endpoints.description: Update an existing action

endpoints.label: Get Instance

fields.label: Instance ID
fields.description: The ID of the spec file execution instance

endpoints.description: Get a spec file execution instance with full test results

endpoints.label: Get Project

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

endpoints.description: Get a project by ID

endpoints.label: Get Many Project

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get many projects

endpoints.label: Get Insights Project

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Date Start
fields.description: Start date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Date End
fields.description: End date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: authors, branches, groups, resolution, tags)

endpoints.description: Get project insights and metrics

endpoints.label: Cancel Run

fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: The ID of the run

endpoints.description: Cancel a run in progress

endpoints.label: Cancel by GitHub CI Run

fields.label: GitHub Run ID
fields.description: The GitHub Actions workflow run ID

fields.label: GitHub Run Attempt
fields.description: The GitHub Actions workflow attempt number

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: projectId, ciBuildId)

endpoints.description: Cancel a run by GitHub Actions workflow run ID

endpoints.label: Delete Run

fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: The ID of the run

endpoints.description: Delete a run and all associated data

endpoints.label: Find Run

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: branch, ciBuildId, tags)

endpoints.description: Find a run by project and filters

endpoints.label: Get Run

fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: The ID of the run

endpoints.description: Get a run by ID

endpoints.label: Get Many Run

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: authors, branches, completionState, dateEnd, dateStart, search, status, tags, tagOperator)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: startingAfter, endingBefore)

endpoints.description: Get many runs for a project

endpoints.label: Reset Run

fields.label: Run ID
fields.description: The ID of the run

fields.label: Machine IDs
fields.description: Comma-separated list of machine identifiers to reset (1-63 items)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: isBatchedOr8n)

endpoints.description: Reset failed specs for re-execution on specified machines

endpoints.label: Generate Signature

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Spec File Path
fields.description: The complete path to the spec file

fields.label: Test Title
fields.placeholder: e.g., should login with valid credentials
fields.description: The test title. For nested describe blocks, use " > " as separator (e.g., "Login > should login with valid credentials").

endpoints.description: Generate a unique test signature

endpoints.label: Get Many Spec File

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Date Start
fields.description: Start date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Date End
fields.description: End date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: authors, branches, groups, specNameFilter, tags)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: includeFailedInDuration, order, dir, page)

endpoints.description: Get aggregated spec file metrics for a project

endpoints.label: Get Many Test

fields.label: Project
fields.description: The Currents project (provide the ID)

fields.label: Date Start
fields.description: Start date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Date End
fields.description: End date for metrics (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: authors, branches, groups, minExecutions, spec, tags, testState, title)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: order, dir, page, metric_settings)

endpoints.description: Get aggregated test metrics for a project

endpoints.label: Get Many Test Result

fields.label: Test Signature
fields.description: The unique test signature. Use the Signature resource to generate this from project ID, spec file path, and test title.

fields.label: Date Start
fields.description: Start date for results (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Date End
fields.description: End date for results (ISO 8601 format) (ISO 8601 date-time)

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: branches, authors, groups, status, tags)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: startingAfter, endingBefore)

endpoints.description: Get historical test execution results for a specific test signature
